titleStmt.title: SII 17.293: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 293. (A.R. No. 265 of 1904.) YŌGIMALLAVARAM, PUTTUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west and south walls of the Parāśarēśvara temple.
This inscription begins with the praśasti, Pugaḻśūḻnda puṇari of the king.

It records a gift of 128 cows for 4 perpetual lamps to god Tippalādīśvaramuḍaiyamahādēva in Tiruchchuganūr in Kuḍavūr-nāḍu in Tiruvēṅgaḍa-kkōṭṭam in Rājēndraśōḻa-maṇḍalam, by Tiruchchiṟṟambala Nambi, a servant in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyiṟ ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyīṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayalnuṉaik kontaḷavaraicar tantaḷa miriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittu toḷ valikāṭṭip poṟpari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit teṉṟicait temarukamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭai
naṉnilappāvai taṉimaiyun tavirttup puṉitat tirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit taṉṉaṭi Iraṇṭum taṭamuṭiyākat toṉnilaventar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu perukakka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunila viḷākam Eṅkaṇun tantu tirunilaveṇṇilāt tikaḻa Oru tanimeruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivāṉtarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭu tanta kalañcori kaḷuṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tenvaṉ karuntalai parunta laittiṭat taṉ poṉ nakarppuṟattiṭaik kiṭappa
ppaṉṉāḷum piṟkulappaṭaipol niṟpiḻai Ennuñ celletir koṭiṟṟallatu taṉkai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuveṉat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavum veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷuṟu viṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟiya viramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippaiḻinta natikaḷuñ cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talaivirittalamarak kuṭaticait tanṉāḷukantu tāṉuntāṉaiyum panṉāḷiṭṭa pala pala mutukum payattetir māṟiya cayap peruntiruvum paḻi Ukantu kuṭutta pukaḻiṉ celviyum vāḷaraviṭṭam maṭantaiya
riṭṭamu miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari Iraiyuṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaṇaveṉnum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicai kaikkoṇṭu Īṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅkoḷḷat tiruvuḷḷat taṭaittu veḷḷa varu parittaraṅkamum moruparikkalaṅkaḷun tantiravāriyu muṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal pāyvatupolat tan peruñceṉaiyai Evip pañcavar Aiyvarum poruta p(o)y kaḷattañci veruneḷittoṭi Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭṭip yaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacār tiriyum poṟṟa veñcurameṟṟik koṟṟa vi
caiyastampan ticaitoṟum niṟutti muttin calāpamum muttamiḻp potiyilum matta veṅkaripaṭumaiyyaṟ caiyyamuṅkanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭik kuṭa nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellān tanivicumpeṟa māveṟiya tan varutanit talaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟi toṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟalkoḷ virasiṁ hāsanantiriya viṭṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyāramun tiruppuyaṟtalaṅkalum pola viramun tiyāka mum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka virasiṁhāsanattup pu
vanam muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripaṉmarāṉa śakravarti kaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupattu nālāvatu rājentracoḻa maṇṭalattut tiruveṅkaṭakkoṭṭattuk kuṭavūr nāṭṭut tiruccukanūrt tip palādīśvara muṭaiya mahātevarkkum tiruppaṇi ceytirukkum tirucciṟṟampala nampi Uṭaiyār tippalātīśvaramuṭaiya mahātevarkku tirunan=tāviḷakku kūṭina pacu 100 2 10 8 - m Ittevar koyili
l kāṇiyuṭaiya civabrāhmaṇan vajiṭa kottattu tillaināyakapaṭṭanenum meṟpaṭi kottrattu tirumalai Uṭaiyānenum meṟpaṭi kottrattu Āṭavalānpaṭṭanenum meṟpaṭikottrattu meṟpaṭi kottrattu moṭipaṭṭaneṉum kāśyapa kottrattut tirukkāḷatti Uṭaiyāne num Ivvanaivom tirunan=tāviḷakku Onṟukku cāvāmuvāpperumpacu muppattiraṇṭākat tirunan=tāviḷakku nālukku koṇṭa pacu 100 2 10 8 Ippa
cu nūṟṟirupatteṭṭuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ittirunan=tāviḷakku 4m śan=tātittaval Erippa tānom Ittevar koyilil tiruvuṇṇāḻikai Uṭaiya civabrāhmaṇarom .
Digital edition of SII 17.293 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
